error_signature: insert or update on table 'workflow_entity' violates foreign key constraint
title: Database migration failure due to foreign key constraint
symptom: The migration process fails with an error related to the 'workflow_entity' table, preventing the n8n container from starting properly.
applies_when: Database migrations are triggered during an upgrade
not_this_if: Using a stable version without recent upgrades
root_cause: The migration process attempts to modify the database schema, but the changes violate existing foreign key constraints, which halts the migration and prevents the application from starting.
fix_steps: Use the Azure CLI to update the container image to a previous stable version.
Run the command: az containerapp update -n [CONTAINER_APP_NAME] -g [RESOURCE_GROUP_NAME] --image docker.io/n8nio/n8n:1.121.3
Verify that the container starts successfully without migration errors.
agent_instruction: Roll back to the previous n8n version 1.121.3 to resolve migration issues.
